---
title: "SCENIC+ Analysis - All Configs"
format: html
params:
  working_dir: "/ra-arco-hvc-nc_seurat-snrna-clustering"
  out_dir_base: "~/ssd/rstudio/multiome/motor-pathway/scenicplus/motor-pathway_scenicplus_v2_cluster-snrna-cr_all"
---

```{r child='motor-pathway_scenicplus_v2_cluster-snrna-cr_all_template.qmd'}
```
